'''鈭歫-ch-l-ch''' ('''kajachlechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jade|jade]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ch-l-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jade|jade]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-ch-l-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kajachlechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
